Tips: If it is a dynamic shape scenario, it is recommended to set torch_npu.npu.set_compile_mode(jit_compile=False) above the training entry file; if it is a fixed shape scenario, it is recommended to set torch_npu.npu.set_compile_mode(jit_compile=True) above the training entry file.
